# Variance Report

## Purpose
Summarize schedule, cost, and scope variance against the baseline and document corrective actions.

## Audience
PMO Lead, Project Manager, Finance Partner, Executive Sponsor.

## Inputs
- Baseline schedule (`docs/templates/schedule/schedule-baseline-waterfall.xlsx`).
- Performance data (actuals, forecasts).
- Risk register updates.

## Required Sections
- Reporting period
- Baseline summary
- Variance analysis
- Root cause analysis
- Corrective actions
- Approvals

## 1. Reporting Period
- **Period start:**
- **Period end:**
- **Prepared by:**

## 2. Baseline Summary
| Baseline Element | Planned | Actual | Variance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Schedule duration |  |  |  |
| Budget |  |  |  |
| Scope (deliverables) |  |  |  |

## 3. Variance Analysis
| Area | Variance | Impact | Severity |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Schedule |  |  |  |
| Cost |  |  |  |
| Scope |  |  |  |
| Quality |  |  |  |

## 4. Variance Trend (Recent Periods)
| Period | Schedule Variance | Cost Variance | Scope Variance | Quality Variance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

## 5. Quality Metrics & Defect Counts
| Metric | Target | Actual | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Defect count |  |  |  |
| Defect leakage |  |  |  |
| Rework hours |  |  |  |

## 6. Root Cause Analysis
Describe the primary drivers of variance.

## 7. Corrective & Preventive Actions
| Action | Owner | Due Date | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 8. Approvals
| Approver | Role | Decision | Date |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Variance quantified with baseline references.
- [ ] Root causes documented.
- [ ] Corrective actions assigned and dated.
- [ ] Approvals recorded.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Variance report reflects accurate baseline comparisons.
- Corrective actions address root causes and have owners.
- Governance approval recorded.
